verses.text: Josiah keeps a great Passover, sets the priests in their charges, and tells the Levites, now that the ark is settled, to serve the LORD and His people. He orders worship with care. The recovered word bears fruit in a feast kept exactly as God commanded.

Josiah keeps a great Passover, sets the priests in their charges, and tells the Levites, now that the ark is settled, to serve the LORD and His people. He orders worship with care. The recovered word bears fruit in a feast kept exactly as God commanded.

Josiah keeps a great Passover, sets the priests in their charges, and tells the Levites, now that the ark is settled, to serve the LORD and His people. He orders worship with care. The recovered word bears fruit in a feast kept exactly as God commanded.

He arranges the Levites by their courses as David and Solomon prescribed, bidding them sanctify themselves and prepare the passover for their brethren. Order serves devotion. Worship that honours God follows His appointed pattern, every servant in his place.

He arranges the Levites by their courses as David and Solomon prescribed, bidding them sanctify themselves and prepare the passover for their brethren. Order serves devotion. Worship that honours God follows His appointed pattern, every servant in his place.

He arranges the Levites by their courses as David and Solomon prescribed, bidding them sanctify themselves and prepare the passover for their brethren. Order serves devotion. Worship that honours God follows His appointed pattern, every servant in his place.

Josiah and his princes give freely — tens of thousands of lambs and cattle — so all the people and Levites can keep the feast. Generous leaders provide for worship. When those at the top give liberally, the whole congregation is enabled to draw near.

Josiah and his princes give freely — tens of thousands of lambs and cattle — so all the people and Levites can keep the feast. Generous leaders provide for worship. When those at the top give liberally, the whole congregation is enabled to draw near.

Josiah and his princes give freely — tens of thousands of lambs and cattle — so all the people and Levites can keep the feast. Generous leaders provide for worship. When those at the top give liberally, the whole congregation is enabled to draw near.

The service is set in order, the priests sprinkling the blood and the Levites flaying the offerings as written. Each does his appointed part. The worship of God moves smoothly when all serve faithfully according to His word.

The service is set in order, the priests sprinkling the blood and the Levites flaying the offerings as written. Each does his appointed part. The worship of God moves smoothly when all serve faithfully according to His word.

The service is set in order, the priests sprinkling the blood and the Levites flaying the offerings as written. Each does his appointed part. The worship of God moves smoothly when all serve faithfully according to His word.

They roast the passover and provide for the priests, while the singers and porters keep their stations and need not leave their service. Every office is honoured and supplied. In God's house, the work of praise and the work of provision go on together.

They roast the passover and provide for the priests, while the singers and porters keep their stations and need not leave their service. Every office is honoured and supplied. In God's house, the work of praise and the work of provision go on together.

They roast the passover and provide for the priests, while the singers and porters keep their stations and need not leave their service. Every office is honoured and supplied. In God's house, the work of praise and the work of provision go on together.

The whole Passover is kept in one day, with no Passover like it since Samuel's time, in Josiah's eighteenth year. A peak of devotion is reached. When God's word is obeyed wholeheartedly, worship rises to a height long unseen.

The whole Passover is kept in one day, with no Passover like it since Samuel's time, in Josiah's eighteenth year. A peak of devotion is reached. When God's word is obeyed wholeheartedly, worship rises to a height long unseen.

The whole Passover is kept in one day, with no Passover like it since Samuel's time, in Josiah's eighteenth year. A peak of devotion is reached. When God's word is obeyed wholeheartedly, worship rises to a height long unseen.

Afterward, Necho of Egypt marches through, warning Josiah not to meddle, for he comes 'from the mouth of God'; but Josiah disguises himself and goes out against him. The good king ignores a true warning. Even the godly may stumble when zeal outruns the will of God.

Afterward, Necho of Egypt marches through, warning Josiah not to meddle, for he comes 'from the mouth of God'; but Josiah disguises himself and goes out against him. The good king ignores a true warning. Even the godly may stumble when zeal outruns the will of God.

Afterward, Necho of Egypt marches through, warning Josiah not to meddle, for he comes 'from the mouth of God'; but Josiah disguises himself and goes out against him. The good king ignores a true warning. Even the godly may stumble when zeal outruns the will of God.

Archers wound Josiah, and he is carried back to Jerusalem to die, and all Judah and Jerusalem mourn for him. The reformer falls in a needless battle. A single step outside God's word can cut short even a most useful life.

Archers wound Josiah, and he is carried back to Jerusalem to die, and all Judah and Jerusalem mourn for him. The reformer falls in a needless battle. A single step outside God's word can cut short even a most useful life.

Jeremiah laments for Josiah, and the singers keep his memory in their lamentations to this day; his good deeds are recorded. A faithful king is deeply mourned. The memory of a life spent for God lingers as a blessing long after he is gone.
